Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}Give this to Kirijo, preferably while you're at school.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}I haven't suddenly decided to go back to school or anything.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}That's a form to extend my leave of absence.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}Don't make much sense to be in an extracurricular squad if I get expelled.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}But, I'll drop it if I can stay absent from school.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SEL_003_0_0
Dialog.Option: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Why are you giving this to me?

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}But, that'd end up being more of a pain than it's worth.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}Goin' myself would be more of a pain than it's worth.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}Plus, it seems like Kirijo depends on you.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}It should be pretty easy to hand it off if you do it at school. I'll pay you back for this, so help me out, alright?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}So you'll do it, no questions asked? I owe you.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}I'm still gonna ask you, though. You're my best bet.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 6 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 6 25 25}Besides, I already know what Aki would say...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 18 0 0}...Huh, I don't see you two together very often.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 19 0 0}{f 4 23 0 2 0 25 25}What're you guys doing back here in the middle of the day?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 22 0 0}{f 4 23 0 2 0 25 25}...I'm guessing that's not the form for returning to school.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 25 0 0}{f 4 23 0 2 0 25 25}If Shinji keeps this up, you'll be his classmates next year.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 26 0 0}{f 4 23 0 2 1 25 25}You and Junpei should practice addressing him casually. In fact, go ahead and boss him around a bit.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 28 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}We're gonna finish the battle this year. I've got no reason to stay enrolled after that.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_019_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 30 0 0}{f 4 23 0 2 2 25 25}You know exactly how concerned Mitsuru is about you. You know what this form means to her, don't you?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 31 0 0}{f 4 23 0 2 0 25 25}Don't tell me you forgot your promise.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_021_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 34 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}Didn't wanna drag you into my problems, but... I'm still countin' on you for that.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_022_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 35 0 0}{f 4 23 0 2 0 25 25}...I've never seen Shinji ask someone else for help with his own problems before.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 36 0 0}{f 4 23 0 2 0 25 25}He'd never say it out loud, but I think he really trusts you.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_024_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 37 0 0}{f 4 23 0 2 1 25 25}Heh, even just being able to stand a guy that antisocial is an accomplishment.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 38 0 0}{f 4 23 0 2 1 25 25}I think he actually likes the fact that you don't back down from anyone.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_025_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 39 0 0}{f 4 23 0 2 3 25 25}I dunno. Yeah, we've know each other a long time...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 40 0 0}{f 4 23 0 2 3 25 25}But sometimes, being too close to somebody can have its drawbacks.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_026_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 41 0 0}{f 4 23 0 2 3 25 25}I'm not gonna nag Shinji about going back to school anymore.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 42 0 0}{f 4 23 0 2 0 25 25}Just do what you think is best. I'll leave it to you.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_027_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Sanada didn't say much on[n]the walk back to the dorm...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It feels like my {f 4 30 0 1 1 0}[n]improved after thinking about[n]what's on Aragaki's mind...[n]{f 1 1}
